texto: I have to certainly stand for life. I know that there are some who disagree, and I respect their point of view. But I believe that life begins at conception. The only exception I have to have on abortion is in that case - of the life of the mother. I struggled with it myself for a long time, but I came to realize life is that gift from God.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Richard Mourdock sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “I have to certainly stand for life. I know that there are some who disagree, and I respect their …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, vida, time, útil em momentos de time e mother.

frase_original: I have to certainly stand for life. I know that there are some who disagree, and I respect their point of view. But I believe that life begins at conception. The only exception I have to have on abortion is in that case - of the life of the mother. I struggled with it myself for a long time, but I came to realize life is that gift from God.
